mapper.sql: id, account_id, market_value, cost_basis, date, note, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE investment_value SET account_id = #{accountId}, market_value = #{marketValue}, cost_basis = #{costBasis}, date = #{date}, note = #{note}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM investment_value WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY date DESC
SELECT FROM investment_value WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(market_value - cost_basis), 0) FROM investment_value WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT COALESCE( (SELECT CASE WHEN cost_basis > 0 THEN (market_value - cost_basis) / cost_basis * 100 ELSE 0 END FROM investment_value WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 0 )
